title: nepeta amethystina var. boissieri
intro: Nepeta amethystina var. boissieri, also known as Mountain Catmint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils, which have antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Mountain Catmint include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to ease menstrual cramps and soothe respiratory problems. Mountain Catmint can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs like lemon balm and chamomile for enhanced relaxation and calming effects.
